haikus.haiku:
Petals softly fall,
Warm hugs wrapped in fragrant air,
Laughter fills the day.
Happy #MotherSDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Rich chocolate whispers,
Nuts crunch in a warm embrace,
Sweet dreams melt in joy.
Happy #NationalNuttyFudgeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of kind hearts,
Petals bloom in soft night air,
Healing hands unite.
#HappyBirthdayFlorenceNightingale from @ClamBakeSanta
